name: 简体中文
description: 由 <color="yellow">月曦MonXi、影月炎YUN、戈伦、JiYv、义锦</color> 翻译，<color="blue">Black_Moss</color>的简中版，祝你们游玩愉快！

main.bandagedsc: 一卷带有绷带的敷料，用于减缓出血、固定骨折并帮助皮肤愈合。对肌肉健康无效。
main.rippeddressingdsc: 一小堆撕碎的布料。可作为临时绷带用于止血。
main.ragdsc: A worn, crumpled up rag. Can be used as decent makeshift dressing. Use in the inventory to dry yourself.
main.analgesicgauzedsc: 棉质编织纱布，含有镇痛药物。能有效减缓出血并减轻伤口疼痛。
main.alginatedsc: 源自临床细菌分泌碳水化合物的敷料，类似生物膜形成方式。减缓出血，大幅促进皮肤愈合并抵抗感染。
main.sterilizedbandagedsc: 一卷带有绷带的敷料，用于减缓出血、固定骨折并帮助皮肤愈合。可抵抗感染。对肌肉健康无效。
main.plasticbandagedsc: 由特殊合成韧性材料制成的卷状物，能高效覆盖伤口并固定骨折。对肌肉健康无效。
main.adhesivebandagedsc: 一包小型医用敷料，用于处理轻微伤口。可减少出血。
main.musharmdsc: Inedible plant part, useful as a one-time makeshift bandage. Can be used as foliage for crafing.
main.paincreamdsc: 一个装有100mL镇痛膏的小瓶子。剂量10mL。
main.morphinedsc: 一个100mL的注射器，通过静脉注射。剂量标签写着过量服用88mL。
main.makeshiftlrddsc: A makeshift Localized Resuscitation Device. Looks like it's taped together. Increases the muscle health and disinfects limb it's used on, AND any directly adjacent limbs. Slightly reduces internal bleeding if used on the chest. Requires at least 25mL of LRD serum to function.
main.lrddsc: A Localized Resuscitation Device, made to easily provide effective general trauma care. Increases limb health, slows bleeding, provides pain relieving drugs and disinfects the limb it's used on, along with any adjacent limbs. Highly reduces internal bleeding if used on the chest. Requires at least 25mL of LRD serum to function.
main.opiumdsc: 一个100mL的注射器，通过静脉注射。剂量标签写着过量服用200mL。
main.heroindsc: 一个150mL的注射器，通过静脉注射。注射器缺少剂量标签。
main.naloxonedsc: 一个100mL的注射器。除了“N”以外，你无法辨认出品牌的名称。
main.sodiumnitroprussidedsc: A 100ml bottle with sodium nitroprusside. As the medication only works intravenously, you will need to get a separate syringe to fill and use.
main.vasopressindsc: A 100ml bottle with vasopressin. As the medication only works intravenously, you will need to get a separate syringe to fill and use.
main.amiodaronedsc: A 100ml bottle with amiodarone. As the medication only works intravenously, you will need to get a separate syringe to fill and use.
main.fentanyldsc: 一个100mL的注射器。注射器内部装有稀释的芬太尼，可以缓解疼痛。剂量标签写着过量服用20mL。
main.autopumpdsc: While worn, pumps blood in place of your heart using a simple mechanism and an internal battery, keeping your blood pressure at livable levels. Might buy you more time to fix whatever catastrophe has befallen you.
main.aeddsc: An electronic device that diagnoses life-threatening cardiac arrhythmias and treats them via electric shocks. Use on the upper torso. Compared to a manual defibrillator, it does not require training, but takes longer to work and uses more power.
main.manualdefibrillatordsc: An electronic device used to stabilize dangerous heart rhythms. Use on the upper torso. This one is manual, and will require some know-how to use correctly. Compared to an AED, it's faster and uses less power, but isn't guaranteed to work. Higher INT makes operation easier.
main.antidepressantsdsc: 一瓶装有140mL抗抑郁药的药瓶。剂量为20mL。
main.antibioticsdsc: 一瓶装有100mL抗生素的药瓶。剂量为20mL。
main.antiraddsc: 一瓶包装贴着炫酷辐射标志的100mL药瓶。剂量为20mL。
main.sleepingpillsdsc: 一个含有25mL药丸的泡罩包装。剂量为5mL。品牌名称缺失。
main.rosepoddsc: 沙玫瑰的组成部分。不会腐败。可被开启。
main.roselightdsc: 沙玫瑰发出的明亮黄色远射光。虽衰减迅速，但适合探测落差深度。用于肢体时可显现潜伏感染。
main.splintdsc: 用于辅助骨折愈合的坚固木板。有助于治疗骨折和脱臼。把它拖放到功能性肢体上会使其失去活动能力，从而降低你的行动能力
main.bloodbagdsc: 一个自带注射器容量0.75L的塑料袋。每次注射时使用375mL。在物品栏使用抽取血量。
main.bloodsacdsc: 内含血液的小型肉质囊袋。与人类血液相似。可食用或用于制作。
main.venomglanddsc: A tiny salivary gland that produces and stores hemotoxin. You could probably process it into some kind of anti-venom.
main.salinedsc: 一个0.75L的袋子，袋子一头有注射针头，通过静脉注射。
main.ringersolutiondsc: 一个0.7L带有针头的袋子，通过静脉注射。
main.bloodbaghumandsc: 一个0.75L的袋子，袋子一头有注射针头。每次注射时使用375mL。在物品栏上使用，抽取自己血液。上面有红色的痕迹。
main.flammablepowderdsc: 具有高度易燃性的粉笔状粉末。可用于制作爆炸物。
main.foliagebagdsc: 用植物纤维捆扎而成的脆弱袋子。
main.slingbagdsc: 经过加固的植物纤维背包，可背在肩上。
main.gravbagdsc: 通过负重力减轻内容物重量的实验性容器。电量耗尽时有爆炸倾向。
main.legpouchdsc: 可绑在大腿上的皮质小包。相当于口袋中的口袋！
main.liquidpouchdsc: A flexible liquid pouch made to store liquids. Has a strap to go over your belly. You can fill it with bottles and vice-versa.
main.materialpouchdsc: 一个坚固的大型腿袋，可以固定在大腿上。上面有许多小口袋用来存放制作材料，能够大幅度减轻负重，但只能容纳很小的物品。
main.pursedsc: A handheld medium-sized bag used to carry personal items. Quite stylish!
main.pouchdsc: 合成纤维编织的绿色小包。无提手。
main.brokenbagdsc: 严重磨损的旧书包。背带断裂无法使用。
main.toolboxdsc: 存放工具的重型金属箱。
main.medkitdsc: A small box which can efficiently hold various medicines.
main.scaffoldingpackdsc: 高度压缩的脚手架套装，便于快速搭建。可使用100次。
main.disinfectantdsc: 一个0.2L的塑料瓶，上面个喷嘴。一次喷出10mL液体。
main.spraybottledsc: A 0.2L bottle with a spray nozzle on it. Sprays 10ml of liquid at a time. Good for correct use of antiseptics.
main.syringedsc: A 100ml syringe which can inject fluid intravenously. It's handmade.
main.scrapmetaldsc: 机械残骸中回收的钢制零件。可放置。常用作幸存者间货币或制作材料。
main.climbingropedsc: 一条加固的绳索，两端带有固定点。可以将其放在悬崖边用它爬下去。它具有两种用途。
main.circuitboarddsc: 从废弃机器拆解的电路板，偶尔仍有电火花。用于制作物品。
main.bloodcrystalsharddsc: 接触物体会渗入血液。随身携带时可缓慢恢复血容量至正常水平。
main.soothingcrystalsharddsc: 散发安抚气息。随身携带时缓慢提升幸福感。
main.reliefcrystalsharddsc: 持有时会感到麻木......随身携带时减轻疼痛。
main.turbulentcrystalsharddsc: 能量震动不息。随身携带时增加跳跃高度。
main.oxygencrystalsharddsc: 持续缓慢释放氧气泡......随身携带时加速耐力恢复。
main.emissivecrystalsharddsc: 能持续发出强光。在失效前可作为光源使用。
main.digestioncrystalsharddsc: 仿佛在吸收体内物质......随身携带时减轻疾病症状。
main.geofruitdsc: 基础但美味的水果，生长于地生树上。热量低，略微解渴且易腐败。
main.stonefruitcloseddsc: 紧附在灰色植株上的坚硬绿色果实，需用牙齿咬开分离。
main.stonefruitopendsc: 味道平淡的硬质绿色果实，含中等脂肪。食用后会明显口渴。
main.bananadsc: 来自外星的美味黄色水果。具有轻微放射性。
main.burgerdsc: 美味的大型零食。同时满足胃袋与心灵！
main.pancakedsc: A layered flat, sweet batter cooked on a hot surface, covered in syrup. Might get into your fur. Tasty!
main.pizzaslicedsc: 烘烤过的披萨切片。极其美味、饱腹且高热量！
main.bucketofchickendsc: A bunch of chicken legs in a bucket. Very filling. Has an exceedingly long shelf life.
main.steakdsc: 精心烹制的大块肉排。饱腹、高热量且美味！
main.cookiesdsc: 一盒烘焙甜点。美味但不健康。
main.chipsdsc: 袋装薄脆土豆切片。美味但不健康。
main.cerealdsc: 普通盒装麦片。干吃无趣但能饱腹，略微增加口渴值。
main.bowlofcerealdsc: 一个0.5L的叶子碗。不知为何，没有燕麦就不能制造它。
main.makeshifthelmetdsc: 用绳索和动物残骸粗制而成的头盔，提供基础头部防护。
main.dogfooddsc: 对犬科生物颇具吸引力的食物。
main.hardcandydsc: 一小袋硬质糖果。美味但不顶饿。
main.fleshchunkdsc: 巨型高脂肪肉块，来源不明。极其饱腹且增肥。
main.candybardsc: 美味的长条糖果。持久耐吃但饱腹感差，过量食用可能致病。
main.chocolatebardsc: 未包装的巧克力条。美味但难以消化。
main.waterbottledsc: 一个0.5L的塑料水瓶。里面有干净的水。
main.waterjugdsc: 一个容量为3L的大号塑料罐
main.bleachdsc: 一个1.5L的塑料瓶，里面装着漂白剂。
main.energydrinkdsc: 一个容量为0.25L的汽水罐，上面有着显目的标识。
main.applejuicedsc: 一个容量为0.8L的纸盒。感觉是... 纯天然的。
main.lemonadedsc: 容量0.75L的罐子。出乎意料的坚硬。
main.foliagedsc: 普通外星植物。难以下咽且易致病，常用于制作物品。
main.foliagemealdsc: 一份不错的即食食品，由脆叶片和简单的馅料制成。保质期不长且不含脂肪，但非常饱腹。
main.dryfoliagedsc: 干燥后略微提升食欲，仍可能引发不适。
main.glowplantfruitdsc: 不可食用的生物荧光体，含中度毒素可抗感染。其汁液能促进化学反应，可用于制作。
main.flashlightdsc: 照亮前方大范围区域但会缓慢耗电。点击切换模式。
main.emergencylightdsc: 一款微型一次性应急手电筒。在电量耗尽前，你可能需要寻找新的光源。切换使用。
main.lanterndsc: 内置明亮黄水晶的简易木框玻璃提灯。
main.lightbulbdsc: 电池供电的白炽灯泡。请勿入口。
main.nutrientbardsc: 纯营养压缩条。味道平淡且永不腐败。
main.primitivediggingtooldsc: 棍棒绑缚的尖锐金属件，挖掘效率高于徒手。
main.makeshiftdiggingtooldsc: 捆扎金属制成的简易岩层挖掘工具，结构脆弱。
main.makeshiftheadlampdsc: 直接用发光果实绑在额头的照明装置，虽不舒适但节省物品栏。
main.shoveldsc: 专业设计的松散物料挖掘工具，虽初次使用却无需教学。
main.woodshoveldsc: 轻质脆性材料制成的挖掘工具。
main.pitchforkdsc: 钢制农具，用于翻动干草、秸秆等松散物料。
main.woodpitchforkdsc: 木质农具，用于翻动松散物料。
main.minilaserdrilldsc: 民用级激光挖掘工具，效率一般但无需消耗体力。
main.heavydrilldsc: 笨重的机械手持钻，效率极高但作用范围有限。
main.pickaxedsc: 专业岩石挖掘工具，效率高但速度慢。
main.titaniumpickaxedsc: 一件精致的工具，由钛金属锻造制成。具备极高的耐用性，能高效清除地形，但作战能力有限。
main.titaniummultitooldsc:
一种小巧却极为坚固耐用的工艺工具，顶端配有沉重锤头，握柄内藏有一把细小却锋利如剃刀的刃片。虽然既不能用于挖掘也不能用于战斗，但它适用于各种制作配方，且几乎可以无限制使用。

<color="red">可在医疗面板中截除严重感染的肢体。
main.titaniummachetedsc:
一把能力卓越且经久耐用的武器，挥动时既轻巧又顺手，而且锋利如剃刀般。刀口经过高温处理，可长期保持锋利。一把出色的自卫武器，万不得已时也可作为挖掘工具使用。

<color="red">可在医疗面板中截除严重感染的肢体。
main.sledgehammerdsc: 长柄平头金属锤，非挖掘专用。
main.woodpickaxedsc: 劣质材料制成的镐，挖掘效率尚可但易损且缓慢。
main.wooddiggingtooldsc: 削尖木棍制成的工具，仅略优于徒手挖掘。
main.machetedsc:
一把宽刃大刀。在近战中非常有用。当你拿着它时，内心感到了些许不安。

<color="red">可在医疗面板中截除严重感染的肢体。
main.crudecleaverdsc:
简单拼接成的金属菜刀，刀刃直接钉在了刀柄上。制作不差，但握在手里让你感觉很不自在。

<color="red">可在医疗面板中截除严重感染的肢体。
main.sickledsc:
弧形刃农具，用于收割作物或清理植被。

<color="red">可在医疗面板中截除严重感染的肢体。
main.rakedsc: 用于松土等农事工作。让你瞬间化身农夫！
main.clawsdsc:
虽是玩具外观却异常锋利坚固。佩戴时自觉威风凛凛。

<color="red">可在医疗面板中截除严重感染的肢体。
main.troweldsc: 木柄金属头的原始园艺工具，总比徒手强些。
main.woodtroweldsc: 全木制的原始园艺工具，或许比徒手强......？
main.experimentfleshdsc: 从同类身上撕下的肉块。能充饥但令人作呕。
main.ropedsc: 植物纤维编织的绳索，用于制作物品。
main.animalfleshdsc: 本地动物尸体上撕下的肉块，与自身体质相近。勉强可食但会轻微不适。
main.internalorgansdsc: 挤压成球的脏器组织，橙色眼球突出可见。虽能充饥但极度恶心反胃。
main.blobfleshdsc: 诡异黏滑的肉块。美味饱腹但可能引发轻微不适。
main.cactusfleshdsc: 多汁甘甜但带刺。美味解渴却难以下咽。
main.neuralboosterdsc: 改变大脑结构的混合药剂，永久性轻微提升行动力。建议单次使用。
main.watchdsc: 周期性显示实用信息（出血时间/潜伏感染/体重变化等）。点击查看运行时间和温度。有个口袋伙伴真安心！
main.tutorialradiodsc: 培训课程标配设备。不确定是否实时通讯。配有可按压按钮。
main.mp3playerdsc: 惊人的是，它似乎还能正常工作。设备内置了一个小型存储驱动器，里面存着几首音乐。你可以播放里面的一首音乐来自娱自乐。
main.mushpeardsc: 蓝色储水植物器官。难以下咽但具吸重特性，食用降低体重。含微量阿片成分。
main.mushtaildsc: 蘑菇植株末梢。所含化学物质可致人昏迷，醒后情绪高涨。无营养价值。
main.mushballdsc: 含水气泡状果实。外观恶心但含水量高，极易腐败。
main.bikehelmetdsc: 减轻头部撞击伤害的专业头盔。
main.holidayhatdsc: You've heard that people wear these for some kind of special occasion, though you're not sure what it's about. It's nice that you were sent with one, at least.
main.headlampdsc: 前额固定的小型照明设备，随使用耗电。
main.dustmaskdsc: 覆盖口鼻的简易防护罩，提供基础头部防护。
main.scarfdsc: 红色温暖且毛茸茸的，能够提供一定保温效果。让你宛如雇佣兵...
main.blueprintdsc: 记录物品制作方法的图纸，附有电子芯片... 使用它可以学习这个配方并增加你的智力经验值。
main.safetyglassesdsc: 坚固塑料眼镜，提供基础头部防护。
main.autozoomgogglesdsc: 具备视觉缩放功能的专业护目镜。
main.blindfolddsc: 遮光黑色布条，提供轻微防护但会封闭视野。
main.balaclavadsc: 加厚保暖头套，提供基础防护和抗寒能力。
main.latexglovesdsc: 基础防护手套，提供轻微环境抗性。
main.fannypackdsc: 腹部佩戴的小型收纳包。
main.bandolierdsc: 肩挂式弹药收纳带，可存放枪械子弹。
main.bellyarmordsc: 金属材质腹部护甲，提供优秀防护和抗性。
main.beltdsc: A leather belt that goes over your belly. Can only hold tools.
main.popcorndsc: A bucket containing a bunch of corn kernels, puffed up from being heated. You find it to be quite a novel concept. Tasty. Has a long shelf life.
main.spacedraindsc: 运用传送技术排干液体的装置。流失物质去向成谜......自动充能。
main.hoodiedsc: 超大号黑色帽衫，保暖且配有小口袋。
main.metabolismchipdsc: 提升新陈代谢的植入体，加速肢体再生但增加饥饿消耗。
main.xalorisspongedsc: 干燥的菌菇孢子囊。可作肢体抗感染或食用，其孢子可能影响免疫系统。
main.jetpackdsc: A device worn as a backpack which uses jets to propel the wearer through the air. Has limited fuel and will be impaired while wet. Hold W to use. It also has a little pocket to store things inside.
main.dynamitedsc: 硝酸甘油制成的爆破物。擅长开山裂石，损伤听力。
main.climbingclawsdsc: 钢制攀岩爪套，实现无限次墙面连跳。
main.plasmacutterdsc: 定向等离子流发生器。可切割金属块，亦能灼烧止血。
main.grapplinghookdsc: 发射绳索钩爪的金属装置。说明书已遗失。
main.ceftriaxonedsc: 一个100mL的静脉注射器，来从旁边的一个小瓶子中取药。
main.woundgluedsc: 一种止血抗菌的胶状物质。能抗感染、促进愈合并高效封堵出血伤口。可能导致循环问题——需谨慎使用。
main.boneweldingtooldsc: 通过焊接加速骨折愈合的实验性装置。该过程会对肢体造成损伤——建议配合敷料使用。
main.paprikashdsc: 由鱼糜、米饭、番茄酱和植物油制成的糊状食物，佐以洋葱、盐和香料。色香俱佳。
main.carcassdsc: 大型昆虫的坚硬残骸。用于制作物品。
main.largecarcassdsc: 两具虫尸拼接成的半管状结构。用于制作物品。
main.carcasssplintdsc: 多具虫尸拼接的长管，可作为骨折治疗的临时夹板。
main.terrainscannerdsc: Shows you a low-quality map of the terrain below you. Terrain is highlighted in green, solid buildings in red. Might be slightly inaccurate. Goes 24 meters down.
main.sleepingbagdsc: An insulated covering for a person to sleep in. Use to sleep in it, bumping the sleeping quality up a tier (capped at Good) and giving you some insulation for the night. Normal sleep restrictions apply.
main.liquidcentrifugedsc: A handheld centrifuge that can inefficiently split a mixture into its base components. The process is rather complex and results in about a third of the total liquid volume being lost. Recharges every 60 seconds.
main.epdadsc: Electronic personal digital assistant, likely accidentally left in a lifepod by your captors. If you get a battery into it, you could probably read up on their notes.
main.bloodcoagulantdsc: 一个100mL的自动注射器。过量范围在34mL。
main.combatpendsc: A 100ml injector pen which instantly injects its contents into the body. Contains a mixture intended to quickly stabilize casualties and aid in combat scenarios.
main.streptokinasedsc: 一个100mL的自动注射器。过量范围在34mL。
main.chestdraindsc: 用于排出胸腔积液。缓解血胸症状，可重复使用。仅限胸部。
main.tweezersdsc: 金属镊子，可无痛清除肢体破片。
main.lockpickingkitdsc: A small array of tools used to efficiently get all sorts of locks open. Have it in your main inventory when picking a lock to use. Needs 10 INT to use, effectiveness scales with higher INT.
main.icepackdsc: 自冷却凝胶冰袋。加速肌肉恢复、减轻疼痛并略微降温。自动续冷。
main.armwarmersdsc: 蓝色保暖护臂，提供低温抗性。
main.carapacedsc: 保护胸部的钢制甲壳，尽显威严。
main.limbwrapsdsc: 纱布制成的临时护具，略微保护四肢并赋予战士般的感受。
main.kneepadsdsc: 塑料护膝垫，缓冲冲击伤害。
main.plushiedsc: 当你挤压它时会发出吱吱声。在情绪低落的时候，你可以把它当作发泄对象。
main.tornshirtdsc: 破旧的蓝色衬衫，提供轻微防护和保暖。
main.rangefinderdsc: 点击测量目标距离的电子设备。
main.mindwipedsc: 一个60mL的瓶子。因为精神抹除是一个十分痛苦的过程，所以里面混入了等量的吗啡，用来缓解精神抹除过程的痛苦。
main.scubadivinggeardsc: 实现水下无限呼吸与体力恢复，提升液体中移动速度，出水后快速干燥。附带改造版浮力装置。
main.filterstrawdsc: 主手持有时可安全饮用地下水并降低其他液体危害，对容器里的水也有作用。
main.wrenchdsc: 用于旋转物体的扭矩工具。相比徒手能更有效矫正关节脱位。此外，它还可用作不错的锤击工具。
main.makeshiftwrenchdsc: 这把粗糙的扳手恐怕更擅长把螺丝砸进洞里，而不是拧进去。它根本无法解决脱节问题，但在制作中比较实用。
main.bruisekitdsc: 促进肌肉愈合的药物组合。提升肌肉/皮肤健康度，高效治疗脱臼。不影响出血。
main.medicalsuturedsc: 用于缝合伤口。立即止血并提升皮肤健康度。
main.tourniquetdsc: 阻断肢体血液循环以止血（不治愈伤口）。需定时解除以免造成缺氧疼痛。可重复使用。
main.browncapdsc: 不明菌类，可能可以疗伤或致命。
main.sneakersdsc: 非犬足设计的白色运动鞋。勉强穿上后可防玻璃碎片。
main.frigiantfruitdsc: 冰冷坚硬的透明果实。美味但大幅降温，严寒环境慎食。
main.purpleherbdsc: 粗糙纹理的干紫叶。缓解疾病、轻微听力损伤及内出血，但会显著升高体温。
main.bulbskindsc: 含高浓度肾上腺素的油性厚皮。略微补水但可能影响脑功能，亦可作临时绷带与肢体镇痛剂。
main.geigefruitdsc: 散发机油味的矩形发光果实。充饥解渴，可能影响肺部功能并随机加剧/缓解辐射病。落地撞击会发出巨响——可用于测高。
main.antisepticmushdsc: 混合植物制成的抗感染药剂。单次使用。
main.striderpeltdsc: 从雪行者身上剥取的厚实白色毛皮，提供卓越保暖性能。
main.funguschunkdsc: 撕下的真菌组织。勉强可食，副作用未知。
main.clottingmushdsc: 促进凝血的小瓶药膏。需要放在特殊容器中以防止变质。虽然单独使用时不太有用，但它可以进一步提炼......
main.bunchunkdsc: 具有凝血特性的真菌组织。需进一步提纯使用。
main.smallbatterydsc: 通用小型电池，容量为中型电池的一半。
main.mediumbatterydsc: 标准通用电池，容量为小型两倍、大型三分之一。
main.largebatterydsc: A large industrial battery that can be inserted into certain electronic devices. Stores three times as much as a medium battery.
main.pistoldsc: 半自动基础手枪，使用9毫米弹匣。潮湿或低耐久时可能卡壳。主手持握查看操作说明。
main.rifledsc: 无托全自动步枪，使用5.56毫米弹匣。潮湿或低耐久时可能卡壳。主手持握查看操作说明。
main.shotgundsc: 无托内置弹仓霰弹枪，直接装填12号霰弹。潮湿或低耐久时可能卡壳。主手持握查看操作说明。
main.9mmrounddsc: 手枪子弹，可装入弹匣或直接上膛（需打开枪机）。
main.556rounddsc: 步枪子弹，可装入弹匣或直接上膛（需打开枪机）。
main.12gaugedsc: 霰弹枪子弹，可直接装填或上膛（需打开枪机）。
main.boxof12gaugedsc: 可存放16发12号霰弹的弹盒。点击取出子弹装填。
main.magazinebasedsc: 带弹簧的特制容器，用于制作弹匣与枪械。
main.makeshiftrifledsc: 用废管材拼凑的栓动步枪，使用9毫米弹匣。潮湿或低耐久时可能卡壳。主手持握查看操作说明。
main.casingdsc: 废弃弹壳。虽无实用价值，但可用于制作物品。
main.scrapcubedsc: 由废料金属熔合成的实心方块。强度不高，可以用来制作。
main.scrappaneldsc: 一块薄薄的废料金属。不怎么坚固，但可以用来制作。
main.scraptubedsc: 由废料金属制成的空心金属管。虽然不是特别坚固，但勉强可以用来制作物品。可以当作粗糙的锤子实用。
main.woodscrapsdsc: 碎木屑。或许能制成某种材料。
main.woodcubedsc: 由木材融合成的实心方块。它很脆弱，但也轻。
main.woodpaneldsc: 由木材制成的薄板。它很脆弱，但也轻。
main.canvasdsc: 由植物材料制成的薄片。很轻而且很耐用，很符合它的定位。
main.nailsdsc: 一堆做工粗糙的钉子。因该能在几个配方上使用到。你可能需要一把锤子来捶打它们。
main.stringdsc: 由植物纤维制成的细绳，看似脆弱实际耐用。用于更复杂的配方中。
main.stickdsc: 一根短木棒，很脆弱但也轻。它短到根本无法当作武器使用，顶多当作粗制滥造的锤子。
main.ilmenitechunkdsc: 一种由铁和钛氧化成的矿物。虽然成本高，但它可以被加工成一种坚硬的钛合金。
main.titaniumslabdsc: 一块由高强度钛合金制成的矩形板材。可以用来进行高级制作。
main.titaniumroddsc: 一根高强度钛合金制成的实心棒子。可以用来进行高级制作，可以当作临时锤子。
main.titaniumsheetdsc: 由高强度钛合金制成的薄但坚固的板材。可以用来进行高级制作。
main.rawcopperdsc: 一块严重氧化的粗糙铜块。提炼后可以用在电子方面的制作。
main.processedcopperdsc: 一块经过生化处理的铜。高可塑性，可以制成电子设备的线路。
main.plasticchunkdsc: 一块柔性塑料，明显是被强行扯出来的。可以用来制作物品，主要用于电子方面的制作。
main.flexiglassdsc: 一块由化学处理的塑料制成的柔性透明薄片。可以用来制作物品。
main.bundleofwiresdsc: 一捆由绝缘材料包裹、整齐捆扎的导线，用于电子方面的制作。
main.flimsyknifedsc:
一把小巧易碎的钝刀子。用于基础制作，在战斗中毫无用处。

<color="red">可在医疗面板中截除严重感染的肢体。
main.craftingbottledsc: 一个用到处可见的废料制成的瓶子。不可以重新填装，空瓶或几分钟后消失。最好趁它还没消失把里面的东西移到其他地方。
main.nondescriptcandsc: A bland, unlabeled can of... something. It doesn't look or smell like anything in particular. Might be good, might be not.
main.canteendsc: 简单的小壶，用来装液体，由几块塑料块粘合成，外面用绳子捆住。容量300mL。
main.lcdscreendsc: 一个简单显示屏，用于制作物品。
main.autoinjectordsc: 在它发明时堪称医学奇迹，这小小的装置可以自动找到静脉或动脉进行注释，并精确输入给定剂量。用于医疗方面制作。
main.keratinboosterdsc: 一瓶装有经过改良的生长激素，可以使角蛋白促进生长。让你的爪子在一段时间内更快地重新生长。
main.drillrepairkitdsc: 一小包用来维修钻探舱的备用零件，可以将舱体恢复到能正常工作的状态。
main.campfiredsc: 燃起的营火。温暖而舒适，靠近它时你会感到暖和。在多种食物配方中作为热源使用。
main.firestarterdsc: 通过快速旋转木杆与固定木材部分之间的摩擦来点燃火焰的一种装置。简单来说就是转棍子生火。可以使用3次，之后会烧尽。
main.charcoaldsc: 一小块轻质木炭。可用于制作中的易燃材料。
main.ryebulbdsc: 装满谷物的薄袋。如果你有锤子工具的话，可以把它压成面粉。
main.ryeflourdsc: 主要用于制作烘焙食品的粉末状材料。你可能需要一些水和热源来处理它。
main.breaddsc: 由面粉和水制成的一块面包。虽然简单，但并不难吃，并且可以保存很长时间。
main.cakedsc: A baked, sweet pastry with some glaze layered ontop. Large, filling and very tasty, though the sugar content makes it a little sickening if eaten too much.
main.pemmicandsc: 由脂肪、干肉和脱水水果组成的混合物。持久耐用，并且热量密度极高。味道中性。
main.torchdsc: Extremely primitive lightsource. While it lights up the way pretty well, it will be put out by liquids. You can relight it with a flame source.
main.lighterdsc: 一款普通的翻盖式打火机。可作为多种制作配方所需的火源，例如点燃篝火或火把。使用次数极多。
main.presentdsc: 一个装饰精美的纸盒，似乎里面有装东西。使用时打开它。
main.woodsandalsdsc: A wood panel attached to your paws with rope. Not comfortable in any way, but it will protect you from sharp debris... If you're lucky, more than one time!
main.minibarreldsc: 一种存储液体的小型工业用桶，极其笨重不方便。

buildings.fungalibungalidsc: 一小片绿色蘑菇丛，运气好或许能采到菌盖。
buildings.climbingropeextendeddsc: 坚固绳索的延伸段。靠近它开始攀爬。
buildings.glowshroomdsc: 散发微光且带有轻微放射性。
buildings.drillpoddsc: 用于地层穿梭的载具。当前无法运作，但可以使用修理工具包恢复运作。可向下穿越2层。
buildings.drillpoddscfixed:
用于地层穿梭的载具。

蹲入其中可向下穿越2层。隔音层已磨损，可能导致听力损伤。
buildings.frigiantdsc: 结着玻璃球状果实的冰晶植物。
buildings.snowstriderdsc: 洞穴寒区活动的毛绒生物，厚实皮毛可御寒。
buildings.spaceheaterdsc: A device that strongly heats the area around it. Might induce minor radiation sickness if you're too close for too long.
buildings.xalorisdsc: 通过加热空气传播孢子的多刺蕨类。能驱散寒冷，但长期吸入孢子可能损害免疫系统。
buildings.tutorialcraftingbuttondsc: Press this if you messed something up and need to start over.
buildings.bioterminaldsc: 标有“请插入人类DNA样本”继续......”的计算机终端。
buildings.lifepodshowerdsc: 提供一次性抗菌泡沫喷雾。
buildings.lifepodpumpdsc: 将任何液体排除生命舱。
buildings.BloodCrystaldsc: 表面渗出黄色液体并释放到周围环境中。
buildings.cactusdsc: 地表人曾说它该是绿色的——至少尖刺这点他们没骗你。
buildings.coildsc: 能瞬间烧毁任何导电体。
buildings.sandvinedsc: 一株长而结实的藤蔓。你可以攀爬它，不过藤蔓太细的话，攀爬可能会比较困难。
buildings.ladderdsc: A vertical set of rungs used for climbing or descending. You assumably know how to use it.
buildings.wallbiterdsc: 令人不安的六足毛绒巨兽，可见外露的锐齿，行动轨迹难以预测。
buildings.thornbackyoungdsc: 暴躁的毛绒年轻棘背兽，喜掘地并撕碎附近活物。
buildings.overgrowntickdsc: 因食物空间过剩而巨大化的蜱虫，凶性不减。
buildings.lifepodbuttonheatdsc: 红色廉价按钮，控制生命舱加热/制冷系统。当前设定为<>。
buildings.lifepodbuttonshowerdsc: 红色廉价按钮，启动生命舱消毒气雾淋浴。
buildings.EmissiveCrystaldsc: 散发着异常明亮的强光。
buildings.geotreedsc: 触感柔软，长着几何形状的类叶结构。
buildings.glowplantdsc: 对环境变化无动于衷的绿色荧光植物。
buildings.leadbushdsc: 结着重金属的伪植物，实为动物。
buildings.lifepodchestdsc: 可能装有基础生存物资。
buildings.LifePodLightdsc: 内置灯泡——或许能拆下来。
buildings.rechargingstationdsc:
用来给电池充电的站点。可接收任意尺寸的电池，且拥有看似无限的能量。用主手插入电池，然后将电池拖回自己物品栏。

它似乎配有音乐播放器，能在你等待的时候舒缓氛围... 讽刺的是，它竟然没有电池。
buildings.reinforceddoordsc: 或许需要特定方式开启......
buildings.sandrosedsc: 长着椭圆形结构的奇异美丽植物。
buildings.scrapeaterdsc: 标有“投入废料开启”的标签，显示屏显示<color=#ffffff>“<>%”。
buildings.shuttleelevatordsc: 你人生中有相当比例的时间都花在乘坐这玩意儿上。
buildings.spikestabberdsc: 形貌可怖，或许能解除其武装......
buildings.stoneplantdsc: 硬质石状基体上附着绿色软质团块。
buildings.stalactitedsc: 与洞顶的连接似乎并不牢固。
buildings.icestalactitedsc: 与洞顶的连接似乎并不牢固。
buildings.drybushdsc: 你强烈怀疑它已经死了。
buildings.brownshroomdsc: 除了颜色之外乏善可陈。
buildings.spentfueldsc: 散发着令人不安的能量。
buildings.traderdsc: 又一个倒霉蛋，至少还有呼吸。
buildings.traderdscdead: 如你所愿，他已经没了呼吸。
buildings.bananaplantdsc: 因黄色粘稠顶部得名的低矮植物，表面极其湿滑。
buildings.oilpipedsc: 渗出黑色焦油的锈蚀管道。时间充裕时会引发区域溢流。
buildings.plantiationdsc: 末端长着半透明球茎的暗紫色长茎植物。
buildings.mushroomdropperdsc: 通过坠落菌盖传播孢子的真菌。
buildings.mushroomropedsc: 一截长长的菌类，看起来你能很轻松地攀附上去。
buildings.sidestabberdsc: 与真菌共生的生物，会向路过者发射尖刺。
buildings.LoreNotedsc: 其他幸存者留下的记录。
buildings.ceilingryedsc: 奇怪的一块薄草地，边缘悬挂着椭圆形的布袋。看起来这些袋子里面装满了某种谷物。
buildings.grabberplantdsc: 它似乎正在用尖端探测周围的环境。
buildings.grabbershroomdsc: 你不理解真菌为啥能做到这些。

moodles.braindamage2dsc: 严重认知障碍。思考与自理能力受限，存在重大脑损伤。
moodles.braindamage1dsc: 脑损伤导致的精神障碍。你感到莫名的困惑......
moodles.strokedsc: Bleeding in the brain, likely caused by severe hypertension. Already in its advanced stages, chances of survival are nil unless you have Braingrow or a procoagulant.
moodles.cantbreathedsc: 窒息！若不立即处理将失去意识并死亡。
moodles.thoraxdestroyeddsc: Your lungs are too damaged to function, caused by critically low thorax muscle health.
moodles.pulmonaryembolismdsc: A large blood clot has broken off and lodged itself in the lungs, blocking an artery. Rapid lung damage and suffocation incoming. Lower your blood viscosity urgently.
moodles.oxygen1dsc: SpO2 below 90%. While not dangerous, it could be a sign of an underlying condition.
moodles.oxygen2dsc: SpO2 below 75%, causing tachycardia and slowly depriving the brain of oxygen. While not lethal, it does point at an underlying condition.
moodles.oxygen3dsc: SpO2 below 60%, depriving tissues of oxygen and likely causing heart arrhythmia. Lethal if left to progress.
moodles.oxygen4dsc: SpO2 below 45%. Something in your body has gone horribly, horribly wrong. Lethal if left to progress.
moodles.fibrillation1dsc: Abnormal heart rhythm, likely caused by severe strain to the body. May progress further if the cause isn't addressed. Can be defibrillated.
moodles.fibrillation2dsc: Severe irregular heartbeat, preventing effective blood pumping. Will progress into lethal V-fib if not treated. Can be defibrillated.
moodles.fibrillation3dsc: Life threatening, chaotic heart rhythm. Asystole is soon to follow. Things have gone horribly wrong.
moodles.palpitationsdsc: You feel your heart pounding out of your chest. Are you just anxious, or is something horribly wrong?
moodles.cardiacarrestdsc: Asystole. If you're somehow conscious, this has a low chance of being treated via defibrillation. Otherwise, cerebral hypoxia and death is soon to follow.
moodles.hypoventilation2dsc: Highly lowered respiratory rate, enough to slowly lower blood oxygen concentration.
moodles.hypotension1dsc: Slightly decreased blood pressure. You feel slightly dizzy.
moodles.hypotension2dsc: Moderately decreased blood pressure. You look pale and have clammy skin. Something is wrong - check your vitals.
moodles.hypotension3dsc: Severely decreased blood pressure, you're on the edge of fainting. Treatment needed. This might start fibrillation, check your vitals.
moodles.hypotension4dsc: Lethally low blood pressure. Blood is not getting to your organs. Cerebral hypoxia and death is imminent.
moodles.hypertension2dsc: Moderately elevated blood pressure. You have a headache, you're dizzy and your nose is bleeding. Check your vitals.
moodles.hypertension3dsc: Severely elevated blood pressure, dangerously close to having severe health complications. You feel terrible. Check your vitals.
moodles.hypertension4dsc: Life-threatening blood pressure. Risk of hemorrhagic stroke. Check your vitals urgently, and watch for stroke symptoms.
moodles.venom1dsc: Slight hemotoxin presence in the bloodstream. Did something bite you?
moodles.venom2dsc: Hemotoxin present in the bloodstream, impairing blood clotting and destroying blood cells. Watch for vital signs.
moodles.venom3dsc: Large amount of hemotoxin present in the bloodstream, clogging your blood and destroying blood cells. Watch for vital signs.
moodles.venom4dsc: Your blood more closely resembles marmalade than something that can upkeep life.
moodles.pain2dsc: 中度疼痛。幸福感缓慢下降。
moodles.pain3dsc: 剧痛导致半昏迷状态，思维迟钝。幸福感持续下降。
moodles.pain4dsc: 撕心裂肺的剧痛。行动受阻。此刻死亡都显得诱人。幸福感急速下降。
moodles.overdose2dsc: 极度放松但肺部沉重，比平常更疲倦。此刻感觉还不错......
moodles.overdose3dsc: 呼吸困难却精神亢奋。这绝对有害健康。多希望快感永存......
moodles.overdose4dsc: Respiratory failure. You are experiencing a drug-filled euphoria. Asphyxiation imminent.
moodles.withdrawal2dsc: 身体渴求药物，恶心反胃......感觉糟透了。建议治疗。
moodles.withdrawal3dsc: 颤抖着竭力保持理智，渴望任何形式的解脱。痛苦不堪。急需治疗。
moodles.withdrawal4dsc: Your body is failing to sustain itself without the opiates it became so reliant on. Your heart is struggling to pump blood around the body; Watch for fibrillation.
moodles.stimulateddsc: Hard stimulant drugs in the bloodstream. You feel ready to tackle anything thrown at you...For now, at least.
moodles.drugoverdosedsc: 非阿片类药物过量。可能出现健康并发症。
moodles.bleeding1dsc: 小伤口持续渗血，暂无生命危险。
moodles.bleeding2dsc: 较大伤口流血不止。健康状态下不至致命。建议治疗。
moodles.bleeding3dsc: 大出血。未经治疗很可能致死。急需治疗。
moodles.bleeding4dsc: <i>As your life gushes out behind you, you remember that you are mortal.
moodles.internalBleeddsc: 你的内脏和肺部显然不是血液该在的地方。建议治疗。
moodles.highbloodvolume2dsc: 身体浮肿，高血压，头晕头痛。
moodles.highbloodvolume3dsc: 严重浮肿。极高血压。几乎无法站立或思考。
moodles.highbloodvolume4dsc: 胸口剧痛......生命体征消失。血容量与血压严重超标。
moodles.exertion3dsc: 严重体力透支，几乎无法移动。（<>%）
moodles.brokenbonedsc: 骨折。尽量避免使用伤肢并充分休息。强烈建议治疗。
moodles.dislocationdsc: 关节脱位。尽量避免使用伤肢并寻求复位。建议治疗。
moodles.brokenneckdsc: 颈椎骨折。脊髓未断裂但任何移动都会剧痛。颈部以下力量减弱，进食痛苦。
moodles.brokenribsdsc: Your ribs are broken, making breathing painful and much harder. Hope none of them punctured your lungs. Weakened arm strength.
moodles.dislocatedjawdsc: 下颌脱位，影响言语且使进食极其痛苦。
moodles.dislocatedspinedsc: 脊椎脱位。脊髓未断裂但任何移动都会剧痛。腰部以下力量减弱。
moodles.infected1dsc: 感染部位红肿发热。需要治疗。寻找抗菌药物。
moodles.infected2dsc: 感染部位渗出深色脓液，持续肿胀。急需治疗。
moodles.infected3dsc: 感染在肢体快速扩散，疼痛加剧。可能引发败血症。必须立即治疗。
moodles.infected4dsc: 感染扩散至其他肢体，感染部位开始坏死。败血症发作。需要紧急救治。
moodles.sepsis1dsc: 全身感染导致强烈排斥反应。意识模糊，低血压伴随高烧。恶化将致命。
moodles.sepsis2dsc: 心率加快，血压降低，头晕目眩伴随高烧。出现器官功能障碍迹象。即将进入感染性休克。
moodles.sepsis3dsc: You couldn't stop for death, so death has kindly stopped by for you. Circulatory collapse imminent.
moodles.concussiondsc: 头部损伤导致昏迷——当头部恢复时将苏醒。
moodles.unconsciousdsc: 对任何外界刺激无反应。陷入黑暗。
moodles.incapacitateddsc: 无法站立或思考。几乎丧失所有知觉。
moodles.confused2dsc: 意识混乱头晕目眩，难以感知周围世界。
moodles.confused3dsc: 几近昏迷，随时可能倒下。
moodles.tired4dsc: 勉强保持清醒，即将因疲惫昏倒。
moodles.hunger2dsc: 饥饿难耐。力量略微下降。
moodles.hunger3dsc: 极度饥饿，渴望进食。力量明显下降。
moodles.hunger4dsc: 全身机能逐渐衰竭......器官即将全面衰竭。
moodles.hunger5dsc: 今日饱餐！降低体重流失速度与行动力。轻微提升幸福感。
moodles.hunger6dsc: 吃到撑！再吃就要吐了。极大降低体重流失与行动力。幸福感提升。
moodles.thirst2dsc: 体内水分不足。非常口渴。
moodles.thirst3dsc: 身体脱水，极度渴望饮水。满脑子只想喝水。
moodles.thirst4dsc:
Blood volume dangerously low and thick due to lack of fluids.
<i>Your dust is becoming one with the earth...
moodles.overhydrated1dsc: Your thirst is fully satiated - you won't need water for a while. Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure increased.
moodles.overhydrated2dsc: You've drank considerably more than needed. Movement slightly impaired. Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure increased.
moodles.overhydrated3dsc: Excessive water intake. Your cells are swelling, causing high intracranial pressure, interrupting blood flow to the brain. Your head hurts... Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure highly increased.
moodles.sick2dsc: 胃部不适，头晕恶心。可能呕吐。
moodles.sick3dsc: 昏昏欲睡，极度不适。极易呕吐。
moodles.sick4dsc: 病入膏肓。体内出现严重问题。虚弱迷糊，痛苦不堪。
moodles.hot2dsc: 令人不适的炎热。口渴加剧。
moodles.hot3dsc: 危险的高温。在酷热中寸步难行......口渴感剧增。
moodles.hot4dsc: 高温导致细胞开始死亡。器官即将发生不可逆损伤。
moodles.cold2dsc: 令人不适的寒冷。身体机能逐渐迟缓。
moodles.cold3dsc: 危险的低体温，身心都被寒冷吞噬。全身机能正慢慢停止。
moodles.cold4dsc: You feel like you're burning up, but you're so tired and confused. You could go for a long nap...
moodles.wet2dsc: 明显湿润。体感温度和舒适度下降。
moodles.wet3dsc: 浑身滴水。体感温度和舒适度显著下降。
moodles.wet4dsc: 彻底湿透！积水让你行动迟缓。体感温度和舒适度急剧下降。
moodles.underweight2dsc: 按种族标准属于不健康偏瘦。力量减弱，携带能力下降。
moodles.underweight3dsc: 危险级的瘦弱憔悴。力量严重减弱，易疲劳嗜睡。携带能力降低。
moodles.underweight4dsc: 瘦骨嶙峋。隔着皮毛都能摸到骨头。心脏衰竭风险极高。携带能力大幅下降。
moodles.overweight2dsc: 虽然相比其他种族还算匀称，但已属不健康肥胖。行动笨拙，更易疲劳。
moodles.overweight3dsc: 危险级的臃肿松软。行动极其笨拙，动不动就累。
moodles.overweight4dsc: 危及生命的肥胖。就像往毛皮里塞满了纯脂肪。心脏衰竭风险极高。
moodles.depression1dsc: 开始意识到处境的严峻。试着转移注意力吧。
moodles.depression2dsc: 缺乏前进动力，情绪挣扎。情况真的不乐观。找个方式分散心神。
moodles.depression3dsc: 几乎不想做任何事。心灵被绝望啃噬。或许一切很快就会结束？
moodles.depression4dsc: <i>How does it feel, knowing you're not coming back up..?
moodles.trauma1dsc: 某些糟糕经历让大脑产生强烈抗拒。幸福感轻微下降。
moodles.trauma2dsc: 近期遭遇让你心神不宁。浑身发抖。再也不想经历那种事了。幸福感下降。
moodles.trauma3dsc: 恐慌惊惧。恐怖画面在眼前闪回。不惜一切代价也想逃离......这种心理创伤需要很久才能愈合。幸福感大幅下降。
moodles.trauma4dsc: 惊恐。无助。绝望。连一个字都说不出来。幸福感严重下降。
moodles.happy3dsc: 在这片奇异之地找到了内心平静。
moodles.happy4dsc: 站在世界之巅，随心所欲开辟前路。无人能挡！
moodles.impairedspeechdsc: 某种原因导致言语困难......可能影响与他人交流。
moodles.deaf2dsc: 高频听力下降。让耳朵休息会儿吧。
moodles.deaf3dsc: 听觉模糊回声不断。烦躁不安。需要时间恢复。
moodles.deaf4dsc: 几乎听不见声音。极度烦躁。听力需长期调养。
moodles.encumbered1dsc: 负重略超舒适范围。<>负重等级。
moodles.encumbered2dsc: 负重过高。体力和机动性下降。被动增加力量/韧性。<>负重等级。
moodles.encumbered3dsc: 严重超载。体力和机动性大幅下降。被动增加力量/韧性。<>负重等级。
moodles.encumbered4dsc: 几乎无法移动。完全超负荷。被动增加力量/韧性。<>负重等级。
moodles.irradiated2dsc: 发烧恶心。皮肤灼痛。情况非常不妙。令人恐惧。
moodles.irradiated3dsc: 全身剧痛病入膏肓。呼吸思考都极度困难。痛苦不堪。
moodles.irradiated4dsc: <i>Not going gently into that good night...
moodles.hemothoraxdsc: Blood is accumulating in the pleural cavity due to internal bleeding, progressively impairing your ability to breathe. Your chest hurts. Treatment recommended.
moodles.badsleepdsc: 粗糙的睡眠环境让脊椎抗议。下次选个柔软的地方吧。意识清醒度下降。
moodles.laststanddsc: 你绝不会轻易倒下。内心深处有什么在推动你继续前进。
moodles.dirty2dsc: 虽然你不介意卫生问题，但免疫系统很介意。快去清洗。（<>%）
moodles.adrenalinedsc: 痛觉麻痹。处于高度警觉状态。
moodles.rnrsdsc: 脑组织快速再生导致的神经休克。虽然会逐渐适应，但建议暂时不要再服用。（<>）
moodles.rippedjawdsc: 头部重伤导致下颌撕裂。进食说话极度困难。这段经历给你留下了严重心理创伤。
moodles.rippedeyedsc: 一颗眼球被扯出，视野减半。产生轻度心理阴影。请保护好剩下的那只。
moodles.rippedeyesdsc: 双目尽失。只能依靠触觉和听觉行动。至少不再需要光源了......
moodles.lowimmunitydsc: 因肮脏、饥渴等原因导致免疫系统严重衰弱。感染将更加危险。请更好地照顾自己。
moodles.highimmunitydsc: 免疫系统高效运转（可能因抗生素）。感染威胁大幅降低，接近200%时甚至可能自愈。
moodles.amputationdsc: 某截肢体已离你而去。这对你造成了严重的心理创伤。当然，失去的部位再也无法使用了。
moodles.clawdamage1dsc: 你的爪子因持续使用而磨损，这降低了伤害输出。让双爪休息一下，或者使用工具。
moodles.clawdamage2dsc: 你的爪子因过度使用而严重损伤，大幅降低了你的伤害输出。若继续徒手使用，可能会损伤你的双爪。
moodles.keratinboosterdsc: 你的爪子再生速度提升三倍。（<>）
moodles.impendingdoomdsc: 你会不由自主地感到一阵突如其来、铺天盖地的恐惧。浑身泛起鸡皮疙瘩，仿佛周遭的天地万物，都在这一刻骤然死寂......
moodles.horrifieddsc: 无法集中精神。无法思考。其他一切都无关紧要。要么逃命，要么殊死一搏！
moodles.focuseddsc: <i>Both of us die today. One, just a little later than the other.

other.layermodifier0dsc: 这里的雾比想象中还大。
other.layermodifier1dsc: 这里的空气比想象中的要热。
other.layermodifier2dsc: 这里的空气比想象中炎热得多！
other.layermodifier3dsc: 这里的空气比想象中的要冷。
other.layermodifier4dsc: 这里空气简直冷得要命！
other.layermodifier5dsc: The terrain here is unusually flooded.
other.layermodifier6dsc: 估计你不会在这里找到任何露天泳池。
other.layermodifier8dsc: 这里昆虫的活动似乎异常频繁。
other.layermodifier9dsc: 核废料曾被倒入过这里。
other.layermodifier10dsc: 一次强大的太阳耀斑使你的芯片暂时失灵了。
other.genplacingentities: 生成植物及隐藏陷阱中......
other.strengthdsc:
你的肌肉量的水平。

影响游戏中你的伤害、投掷力量和手速，
与韧性结合提升载重能力。

通过攻击、负重前行和运动来增加。
other.resiliencedsc:
你的身体耐力和心理承受能力。

增加耐力回复速度，以及增加对疼痛的抵抗能力。
与力量结合提升载重能力。

通过感到痛苦、杀死生物、负重前行、跳跃、从高空坠落和锻炼来增加。
other.intelligencedsc:
你的智商。

影响你能认识和制作物品，以及交易技巧。

通过制作新配方、阅读蓝图、交易和向下探索层级来增加。
other.experienceatend: 达到下一等级所需的经验
other.lrdserumdsc: 局部复苏装置使用的特殊混合物。如果使用其它工具注射无效
other.cleanwaterdsc: 过滤的水。很安全，但没什么味道。
other.carbonatedwaterdsc: It's spicy water. You like the fizz.
other.alcoholdsc: 无标签的酒精。虽然你不能消化它，但它对伤口消毒很有用。
other.milkdsc: 由哺乳动物的乳腺产生的白色液体。很好喝！
other.sodadsc: 含糖的美味饮料，适量饮用对身体好。
other.urinedsc: 酸甜柠檬味饮料。味道还行，不知怎的，闻着一股子怪味。
other.bleachdsc: 用来去色与消毒。饮用可致命。
other.energydrinkdsc: 美味的咖啡因饮料。美味且提神醒脑，但对你的种族有毒。
other.sportsdrinkdsc: Non-caffeinated electrolyte drink. Quenches thirst efficiently, gives you a little boost and tastes nice.
other.oliveoildsc: A vegetable oil obtained by pressing whole olives. Very fatty and somewhat unpleasant to drink.
other.icecreamdsc: A frozen dessert made from milk and cream that has been flavoured with a sweetener. Somehow still cold. Delicious!
other.radwaterdsc: Clean, filtered water. Safe, but tastes like nothing... On further inspection, it seems mildly radioactive.
other.yogurtdsc: Bacterially fermented milk. Tastes okay. Decently filling.
other.molddsc: Any indication of what this once was is long gone. Smells putrid...
other.orangejuicedsc: Liquid extract of the orange tree fruit. While it is healthy, you're really not a fan of the taste.
other.applejuicedsc: 用苹果浸泡和压榨制作的果汁。很美味！
other.hotsaucedsc: Condiment made from particularly spicy peppers. Burns your mouth, but warms you up... Somehow.
other.chloroformdsc: A volatile, colorless, sweet-smelling, dense liquid produced on a large scale as a precursor to refrigerants and polytetrafluoroethylene. In practical use, it's very useful at knocking people out.
other.mercurydsc: Liquid metal. Great for skin care, not so great for your bodily functions.
other.ketchupdsc: 酸甜的番茄酱。但单喝有点恶心。
other.powderedmilkdsc: Dehydrated and compressed efficient milk powder. While not edible on its own, it'll turn into milk when mixed with hot water.
other.morphinedsc: 可减轻疼痛的强效阿片类药物。口服时效果较差。
other.opiumdsc: 可减轻疼痛的温和阿片类药物。口服时效果较差。
other.heroindsc: 可减轻疼痛的超强效阿片类药物。你对它了解不多。
other.naloxonedsc: 阿片类药物拮抗剂，可以治疗阿片药物服用过量。快速服用可能挽救你的生命。
other.fentanyldsc: 极高强效阿片类药物，强度是吗啡的100倍，考虑稀释后使用。
other.ceftriaxonedsc: 第三代头孢菌素抗生素用于治疗感染，增强身体免疫能力一段时间，但会引起疼痛。
other.reliefcreamdsc: 一种药品混合物，能够快速减轻疼痛。
other.woundgluedsc: A hemostatic, antibiotic glue-like substance. Fights infection, promotes healing and is very effective at sealing bleeding wounds. Might cause circulation problems - use with care.
other.keratinboosterdsc: A modified growth hormone that specifically targets keratin in order to encourage its growth. Makes your claws regrow faster for a while.
other.highgradestimulantdsc: Medical stimulant drug. Gives you a very good kick for a pretty long while, and is generally safe to use. Overdose generally entails weakness, with a neglegible crash. Dosage is 100ml.
other.midgradestimulantdsc: Decently refined stimulating hard drug. Only works intravenously. Will give you a pretty good kick for a short while, but has some side effects. Overdose entails weakness and internal bleeding. Dosage is 50ml.
other.lowgradestimulantdsc: Unrefined stimulating hard drug. Dodgy. Gives you a pretty nice kick, but overdose and the subsequent crash is extremely debilitating. Dosage is unknown. Use with caution.
other.naltrexonedsc: 用于治疗一般疾病或阿片类药物滥用，但会降低幸福度并会导致呕吐。
other.painkillersdsc: 用于减缓疼痛的药品。过量服用为60mL。
other.disinfectantdsc: 基础消毒剂，可以抵抗感染，但会有一点痛。
other.ringersolutiondsc: 将几种盐溶解在一起的溶液，与动物体液相似。可以缓解口渴和失血。
other.salinedsc: 盐水混合物，可以治疗低血容和口渴。
other.antivenomdsc: A treatment for evenomation, it's composed of antibodies that disable hemotoxins in the bloodstream. Works intravenously.
other.blooddsc: 黄色的血液。虽然这种颜色对你来说很正常，但这显然是生物制造过程中的副作用。可以治疗低血容。
other.redblooddsc: 红色的血液。它看起来很奇怪，气味让你想起那些“捉捕者”。可以治疗低血容，但你的身体可能受不了它。
other.alienblooddsc: 外星的黄色血液。虽然看起来和你的血类似，但明显有些不同。不过作为替代血液问题不大。
other.antiserumdsc: 含有抗体的血清，可以抵抗大多数感染，并增强免疫能力，并减少败血症，略微增加血容量。
other.antibioticsdsc: 可以增加免疫能力的药物，可以抵抗所有感染，口感令人不快。
other.sleepingpillsdsc: 强效安眠药。让你在身体状况差是强制睡觉，不要和其他阿片类药物服用。
other.procoagulantdsc: Chemical which promotes blood clotting. Globally slows down blood loss, including internal bleeding. Will cause complications if overused.
other.epinephrinedsc: Pure adrenaline. Reduces pain for a while and has a low chance to restart the heart if it stops. Going over 40ml will cause fibrillation.
other.oxylinedsc: Synthesized reagent that quickly reoxygenates the bloodstream when injected, also stabilizing fibrillation and promoting hemoglobin production. Has explosive tendencies when mixed with stomach acid.
other.antidepressantsdsc: 强效抗抑郁药片。能暂时让你对情绪的感知变得麻木，并缓慢增加幸福度。不过可能有副作用。
other.antiraddsc: 可直接减缓辐射病的实验性药物，服用效果明显。病重需要更高剂量。
other.braingrowdsc: 特殊口服药物，可以刺激大脑再生。提高提高大脑完整度，但常有严重副作用。
other.mindwipedsc: 特殊合成药物，能够抹除大部分记忆和心理创伤，留下一个只有本能和基本知识的空壳。通常作为那些无法正常生活和有自杀倾向患者的最后手段使用，也可以治疗中度到严重脑损伤。效果是永久的，除非大量康复治疗。请作为最后手段使用。
other.streptokinasedsc: Blood thinner. Strongly reduces blood viscosity and breaks down clots.
other.sodiumnitroprussidedsc: A medication used to lower blood pressure, useful for avoiding hypertensive crisis. Only works intravenously. 10ml per minute.
other.vasopressindsc: A hormone used to increase blood pressure, useful for avoiding lethal hypotension. Only works intravenously. 10ml per minute.
other.amiodaronedsc: An antiarrhythmic medication used to treat and prevent fibrillation from occurring. Will cause most arrhythmias to slowly regress, but causes mild internal damage. Only works intravenously. 20ml per minute.
other.chocolatemilkdsc: 一种通过牛奶和可可固体融合成的风味牛奶。十分可口，但对你的种族来说有毒。能增加幸福度，不过请适度饮用。
other.icedteadsc: 凉爽可口的无咖啡因凉茶！非常好喝！
other.soupdsc: 不知道是什么汤，但十分美味。
other.cerealdsc: 世界上在伟大的发明——牛奶和谷物。非常美味和饱腹。
other.coffeedsc: 由烘培的咖啡豆制成的饮料。美味且提神醒脑，但由于咖啡因含量高所以对你来说有毒。
other.biochemdsc: 一种化学混合物，可以促进化学反应将某些材料粘合在一起，甚至能融化它们。在制作中很常见。
other.groundwaterdsc: 略微浑浊的地下水。饮用基本安全但可能轻微不适。
other.waterdsc: 略微浑浊的地下水。饮用基本安全但可能轻微不适。
other.dirtywaterdsc: At least it's not on your body anymore. Not safe to drink.
other.algaedsc: 富含生物荧光藻类的水体。浮力极强。不能饮用。
other.oildsc: 粘稠的黑色焦油。难以穿行。不能饮用。
other.sapdsc: 丛林树木分泌的粘稠汁液。含糖量极高。
other.fatdsc: 液体动物脂肪，取自动物肉。可以食用，但味道很差。可以加工成肥皂。
other.soapdsc: 用动物脂肪制成的肥皂。在医疗面板中使用来清理身体污垢，能对伤口进行轻微消毒。
other.producejuicedsc: 由一堆水果蔬菜和其他东西混合成的捣碎，再加水混合成。味道嘛... 很有意思。
other.refinedjuicedsc: 煮熟并充分混合、捣碎后的水果汁。非常美味且营养丰富！
other.Head: 头部
other.experimenttraderdsc: 身形矮小的怪异鼠犬人，后脑勺上长有三根软刺。头部看起来像啮齿动物的形态。虽说它们有些笨拙，但在交易领域中也没有什么特别突出的特点。它们接受一个拥抱并不需要太多信任。
other.milkytraderdsc: 身形十分矮小的白色毛茸茸生物，长着扁平短小的口鼻，顶上还有着两根短短的白角。似乎兼具一定水生属性，从其背部的一对鳍肢便可判断。其性格尤为聪明，却略带几分傲慢，碍于自身并不出众的体格，身上必定会携带某种武器作为弥补。它们不爱跟人有肢体接触，若想获得它们的拥抱需要获得更多信任。
other.dunetraderdsc: 身形高大、体格宽硕、气势逼人、四肢发达但头脑简单。其身上散布着外形奇特的鳍，头部两侧生有6根尖刺，且有一张骇人的巨口，口中满布着硕大锋利的尖牙。躯干周围似乎生有鳃部组织。虽然它们没有直接具有攻击性，但大多只是受饥饿驱使，因此它们大概不在意你给它们的任何小玩意；你得想个更好的办法来讨好它们。

other.unchippeddsc:

other.tutbasic1: Welcome to the final revisional training course.
other.tutbasic2: We will go over all the basics you will need to know for the next experiment you will participate in.
other.tutbasic3: Please walk towards the Training Armature Device. [A]
other.tutbasic6: [SPACE] to jump. Hold to jump higher. You can jump off of walls too.
other.tutbasic7: Make your way to the Training Armature Device.
other.tutbasic9: Now, let's go over holding things.
other.tutbasic10: Item interactions are done with [RIGHT CLICK]. Click on yourself to see your inventory, click away to close.
other.tutbasic11: Here's something for you to play with. [RIGHT CLICK] and drag it onto yourself, then a slot to pick it up.
other.tutbasic12: Neat. You can also use the item from the inventory. Drag it into the center to use it and continue.
other.tutbasic13: Tastes amazing, doesn't it? You should eat the entire thing now.
other.tutbasic13fail: I wanted you to pick it up, not eat it... Gosh, the entire thing? All at once..?
other.tutbasic15: Lets try something else. Here's another thing to play with.
other.tutbasic16: You have six main slots to put things in. Two hands, one mouth, three slots on your back.
other.tutbasic17: Put this in one of your hands.
other.tutbasic18: Certain tools are usable from your "Main hand". Put the rake there and try swinging it with [LEFT CLICK].
other.tutbasic19: You really are fighting the ghosts now... Well done!
other.tutbasic20: You can also quickly swap whatever's in your hands by pressing [Q]. Try it!
other.tutbasic21: Doing things at a range is also a very useful skill. Hold [T] to throw whatever's in your main hand. Aim for the target we just made!
other.tutbasic23: Lets get that rake back into your hands now.
other.tutbasic24: You can dig through things by swinging at them. This will exhaust you fast, but is useful when done sparingly.
other.tutbasic25: Dig over to the other side. Hold [S] to crouch down.
other.tutbasic26: Some conditions like pain or exhaustion will take a while to go away. Speed up time [1-3] to make them go by faster.
other.tutbasic28: We will now go over the basics of first aid. Please hold still.
other.tutbasic29: Ouch! Your arm's hurt and bleeding! Lets check it out. Open the health panel with [R] or the heart button.
other.tutbasic30: Hover over the hurt limb to see more info.
other.tutbasic31: Decently sized puncture wound. Good news - you're going to fix it!
other.tutbasic32: Here's some dressing. Mouse over it while holding [SHIFT]. It says "Usable in health panel".
other.tutbasic33: Pick it up, then open the health panel.
other.tutbasic34: [RIGHT CLICK] drag the dressing over the damaged limb.
other.tutbasic35: Time for some physical work. [LEFT CLICK] wrap the dressing around! For testing purposes, it's infinite.
other.tutbasic36: You're saved! For now, at least. You should always have some dressings on you. They save lives.
other.tutbasic37: Shucks. Looks like that wound got infected! (Normally you'd only find out a while later.)
other.tutbasic38: Another important medicine! Some antiseptic, read what it does if you wish. Pick it up and open the health panel.
other.tutbasic39: Same story as before. Apply the antiseptic to the infected site.
other.tutbasicfail1: You... Used the entire thing. In the wrong spot...
other.tutbasicfail2: Lets just... Imagine you did it correctly.
other.tutbasic40: Neat! Do this every few minutes to make the infection disappear. The arrow on the icon shows if it's regressing or progressing.
other.tutbasic41: You really don't want to ignore infections; They are lethal if left to progress. Being well fed and in good shape will slow them down.
other.tutbasic42: More detailed health info is provided in the First Aid Course. You can do it later if you wish.
other.tutbasic44: Trash bag! You should be very familiar with it. We've seen your kind sleeping in them sometimes.
other.tutbasic45: It's a container, meaning it extends how many things you can have on you. Try dragging another item into it.
other.tutbasic46: Wow, it's stored inside! Now [RIGHT CLICK] the bag and pull the item back out.
other.tutbasic46fail1: Wh... Why... Why'd you rip it up..?
other.tutbasic46fail3: You are testing my patience. Stop ripping the bags apart. We will skip this segment as you are not cooperating.
other.tutbasic47: Well done. Containers are extremely useful to have, keep an eye out for any.
other.tutbasic48: Here's something new. See if you can figure out how to put it on.
other.tutbasic49: Nice! Wearables work outside of the normal inventory slots. This one can also have stuff put in it!
other.tutbasic50: Try putting the empty trash bag into the backpack you're wearing. You can put empty containers inside others!
other.tutbasic51: Procuring things on your own is a very useful skill.
other.tutbasic52: Open the crafting menu by pressing [C] (or the button).
other.tutbasic53: You'll make a foliage bag. To do that, you'll need to make two canvases and one rope. We have given you some foliage to do so.
other.tutbasic54: Recipes you can make are at the top of the list highlighted in white. Click on the rope recipe, then on the rope icon in the top right.
other.tutbasic55: Nice. Halfway there. Make the canvases now.
other.tutbasic56: When you have both canvases and the rope on you, make the foliage bag.
other.tutbasic57: Well done! You can also switch between recipe categories, or use the search bar. You'll get more info in the Crafting Course.
other.tutbasic58: Lets take a quick look at the health panel again.
other.tutbasic59: Look up in the top right. Those are your skills. In order, Strength, Resilience and Intelligence.
other.tutbasic60: Strength is your amount of muscle mass. It mainly improves your attacks and carrying capacity.
other.tutbasic61: Resilience is your physical endurance and mental fortitude. It makes you more resistant to pain and tiredness.
other.tutbasic62: Intelligence defines your knowledge. It affects what you can craft, recognize, trader interactions and defibrillator usage.
other.tutbasic63: You can hover over either of the skills to learn more.
other.tutbasic64: Strength and Resilience can be additionally increased by working out. Try it, using the button in the lower right.
other.tutbasic65: You might've also noticed the nap button right under exercise.
other.tutbasic66: Sleep is important for recovering your energy. We made you a little bed to sleep on, try napping there!
other.tutbasic67: The surface on which you sleep matters! Rubber is especially comfy, while rocks are particularly harsh. It's good to give your back a break sometimes.
other.tutbasic68: This concludes your final revisional training. You may now return to your designated room.
other.tutaid1: Welcome to the First Aid Course. We will go over your body, some injuries and how to treat them.
other.tutaid2: Open the health panel. You can bark at me to skip through this part.
other.tutaid3: It's time to start paying attention to the big panel to the left. It might be overwhelming for a while, but we'll touch on the more important things.
other.tutaid4: This is your brain integrity. When your brain dies, you die. Today you'll learn how to keep IT alive.
other.tutaid5: This is your consciousness, or how aware of your surroundings you are.
other.tutaid6: This is your total pain. It usually goes down by itself over time.
other.tutaid7: This is your blood volume. It will go down as you bleed it out, eventually leading to death. Consider 2.5L to be around the lethal limit.
other.tutaid8: This is your rate of bleeding. Fortunately, you're not bleeding right now, so there's nothing displayed.
other.tutaid9: This is your immunity, a metric of how capable your immune system is at defending your body from infection.
other.tutaid10: This is your stamina. Physical exertion will lower it.
other.tutaid11: This is your respiratory rate. Your oxygen will lower if you don't breathe enough.
other.tutaid12: This is your absorbed radiation. Don't ask what that is, just know that more than zero means trouble.
other.tutaid13: This is your heartrate. You'll want to keep this above 0.
other.tutaid14: This is your blood pressure. Don't let it get too high or too low.
other.tutaid15: This is your blood oxygen, also referred to as SpO2.
other.tutaid16: This is an ECG. It visualizes your heart rhythm. Get used to it, as you'll stare at it often.
other.tutaid17: Lastly, this is the limb-specific health panel. Most of it is pretty self explanatory, so we won't cover it for now.
other.tutaid18: ...It's a lot, but you can just check your moodles at any time to learn most of these. Don't worry about it too much.
other.tutaid19: We will now get to some common injuries.
other.tutaid20: Bleeding is likely the most common thing you will encounter. It risks infection, and more importantly, lowers your total blood volume.
other.tutaid21: Your brain needs oxygen to live. To get oxygen, it needs a sufficient amount of flowing, oxygenated blood.
other.tutaid22: Here's some dressing. You know how to use it, fix your bleeding.
other.tutaid23: Take a look at your blood pressure. Normally it should stay around 120/80.
other.tutaid24: Blood pressure is directly affected by your heart rate, blood volume and blood vessel constriction/dilation.
other.tutaid25: In crisis scenarios, survival boils down to making sure your blood pressure stays at a safe level and that your heart keeps beating.
other.tutaid26: I am now removing your blood. Keep an eye on your blood pressure.
other.tutaid27: Your blood pressure is now really low, forcing your heart to compensate by speeding up.
other.tutaid28: This only goes so far, though. With really high heart rates or really low pressures, something called FIBRILLATION will start.
other.tutaid29: Fibrillation is the process of your heart rhythm getting more erratic until it stops. It kills in about two minutes.
other.tutaid30: You might notice an arrhythmia moodle in the bottom left. This is a sign of said fibrillation.
other.tutaid31: This is an Automated External Defibrillator. It resets your fibrillation to zero, stabilizing you for a while.
other.tutaid32: Use it on your chest and follow the steps it gives you. Good luck.
other.tutaid34: Now, I want you to notice something. Look at your ECG.
other.tutaid35: We will sweep your heart through all stages of fibrillation. I want you to look at how the rhythm changes with it.
other.tutaid36: Do you see how it becomes distinctly wavey at high fibrillation?
other.tutaid37: This is a manual defibrillator. It's similar to the AED, but can fail if used wrong. Use it on your chest.
other.tutaidfail1: Wrong spot. Use it on your CHEST.
other.tutaidfail2: Chest. Your thorax. You used it in the wrong spot... Use it on your CHEST. You want to defibrillate your heart... Which is located in your chest. How did you even get to this point?
other.tutaid38: To use it correctly, you must match the power level to how far fibrillation has progressed.
other.tutaid39: This means that if arrhythmia just started, you set the power level low. If your heart is seconds from stopping, you set it high.
other.tutaid40: You can determine this using the ECG and power estimation visible here. The better you align the power level, the higher chance of it working.
other.tutaid41: Try doing that. Set power, charge then shock until your arrhythmia goes away. You'll get it eventually. Try using the ECG and power estimation.
other.tutaid42: Lets say something goes horribly wrong. Wear this, then open the health panel.
other.tutaid43: Your heart is no longer beating. The only thing keeping you conscious is the autopump you just put on. This is the worst case scenario.
other.tutaid44: Defibrillators can fix this, but it'll take a while. There's a better way.
other.tutaid45: Epinephrine is a special drug that can restart your heart, found in combat pens. Inject it.
other.tutaid47: Theres something notable that isn't shown in the health panel, that being blood viscosity.
other.tutaid48: Blood viscosity is simply how thick or diluted your blood is. Both extremes can cause issues, but extremely thick blood is more dangerous.
other.tutaid49: Extremely thick blood can cause a Pulmonary Embolism, which will damage your thorax. Severe damage to the thorax will impair and eventually stop your breathing.
other.tutaid50: To break the clot down, use streptokinase.
other.tutaid51: Nicely done, but lets see what happens if your thorax did fail.
other.tutaid52: You must increase your thorax muscle health to breathe again. This bruise kit does just that - use it on your thorax.
other.tutaid53: Back in working order. Low respiration will lower your SpO2, which will eventually cause unconsciousness, fibrillation and death.
other.tutaid54: One more thing to note about circulation is high blood pressure, or hypertension. It's usually more manageable, but can still be very dangerous.
other.tutaid55: The main danger is the risk of stroke if hypertension becomes too severe. Try not to let your blood pressure go above 180/120.
other.tutaid56: You'll feel a lot of this out with experience. You will now be given some supplies. Bark at me with [B] when you're ready to move on.
other.tutaid57: We will now take a look at some more miscellaneous injuries.
other.tutaid58: Dislocations are a common injury, usually acquired from bad falls. Dislocated limbs cause a lot of pain when used.
other.tutaid59: You can fix dislocations by hand. Try it.
other.tutaid60: You need to hit the joint back into place. Gain some speed with your hand, then [LEFT CLICK] over the joint to hit it hard.
other.tutaid61: Fractures are similar to dislocations, but are more severe and need either time or special tools to fix.
other.tutaid62: A splint is a very simple, yet effective way to treat a fracture. Put this splint on your broken hand.
other.tutaid63: Neat. Splints speed up the healing of a fractured limb significantly. Putting dressing on the limb would also help slightly.
other.tutaid64: Your limbs stop functioning when their muscle health nears zero, making it so you, for example, can't hold things with the respective limb.
other.tutaid65: You can switch which hand you use as your main in the bottom right of the health panel. Try it. Note that you're not ambidextrous.
other.tutaid66: Severe pain is one of the most debilitating ailments you can get.
other.tutaid67: It immobilizes you, quickly worsens mood and can make you pass out from shock.
other.tutaid68: Luckily for you, there's a pretty simple way to treat it.
other.tutaid69: Opiates quickly reduce pain across your entire body when used. Inject the entire thing and see.
other.tutaid72: Be careful with opiates - you can overdose on them easily, or go into withdrawals after. Naloxone and naltrexone can help with opiate abuse.
other.tutaid73: This concludes the First Aid Course. We could cover more, but we believe you can safely figure out other afflictions. You may return to your assigned room.
other.tutcraft1: Welcome to the Crafting Course. Today, we will cover the details of procuring items and show certain common workflows.
other.tutcraft2: Almost everything you see is real matter and not trash.
other.tutcraft3: You can harvest metal from scrap piles and traps, wood from wood structures, foliage from plants, etc.
other.tutcraft4: Your objective will be to create a specified item using the resources given to you.
other.tutcraft5: We will assume you know the bare basics of crafting. Create a foliage bag using the following materials. Use the reset button if you make a mistake.
other.tutcraft6: First steps. Nicely done. Getting a container should always be your first goal.
other.tutcraft7: An important thing to note is that you can use items near you on the ground for crafting. Bark at me with [B] once you've fully absorbed this information.
other.tutcraft8: Lets try again with the same resources. Make a full dressing this time. You can drag any item onto the crafting button to see what recipes it can be used in.
other.tutcraft9: Nicely done. Dressings are very cheap to make and are crucial for your survival. They should be your priority right after getting a container.
other.tutcraft10: Important note - you can pin a recipe to have it permanently highlighted in the corner, using the button in the bottom right of the crafting menu. Pin the recipe for a flimsy knife.
other.tutcraft11: Lets add some scrap and wood to the mix. Create a flimsy knife using these resources. You can merge items in the inventory.
other.tutcraft12: Nicely done. Something to note is that you can favourite items to prevent them from being used in crafting recipes. You'd do this for stuff like bags, to not rip them up by accident.
other.tutcraft13: Press [F] on the flimsy knife you just made to favourite it.
other.tutcraft14: Now, try making a sterilized dressing using these items. Remember you can rip certain bags and clothing items via crafting.
other.tutcraft15: Nice. You might've noticed we made your INT level go up for this test.
other.tutcraft16: Crafting ability is tied to your intelligence level. You might've noticed that every recipe has its own INT requirement.
other.tutcraft17: You gain INT whenever you use a blueprint or make a recipe for the first time.
other.tutcraft18: You can make recipes that are up to 3 INT higher than your current INT, with progressively worse results.
other.tutcraft19: 1 INT higher has a 50% chance of damaging the resulting item. 2 INT, 50% chance of fully wasting material, and at 3 INT, you also damage yourself slightly.
other.tutcraft20: You have enough INT to make a machete now. Do that.
other.tutcraft21: Clever little fella, aren't you. You can further upgrade your tools with, for example, titanium alloys. Making digging tools is useful too.
other.tutcraft22: Lets move onto food-related crafts. Most of them require a campfire.
other.tutcraft23: Boil the groundwater into clean water. You'll need to make a canteen to collect it, and a campfire to boil it.
other.tutcraft26: Well done. We will move on to your final crafting challenge now.
other.tutcraft27: Make a mini laser drill and a battery to put inside of it. This is your final objective for today.
other.tutcraft29: This concludes the Crafting Course. Hopefully you can put into practice the knowledge you have attained. You may return to your assigned room.
other.startlorenote:
Year 2XXX 
<>
Humanity has technologically progressed to a significant extent. 
<>
One corporation began to put research into bio-engineering, combining animal and human DNA. 
<>
This led to their creation of the Experiment species, along with dozens of later offshoots. 
<>
After years of unethical private testing in labs, they set their sights on something bigger. 
<>
They knew of a gray planet with thriving flora, fauna and an easy space travel path. 
<>
Soon, thousands of specimens, buildings and miscellaneous cargo were sent. 
<>
While most was shipped correctly, a large amount of cargo was mistakenly sent to the planet's expansive cave network due to a calibration error. 
<>
This includes a mistakenly sent piece of important experimental technology, which now sat deep in the underground systems, without an easy way to get it back. 
<>
This, however, was seen as an opportunity by the scientists to do more behavioural research by sending thousands of specimens down to retrieve the lost tech. 
<>
The chance of it working were low, but shipment is cheap and their breathing fodder is plenty. 
<>
You are one unlucky specimen.
Resistance is not an option.

notes.Item1: 这太可怕了。到处都是尸体......我好害怕。他们为什么派这么多我们来这里？我不明白。我真的不明白。他们用某种飞镖把我打晕，强行塞进舱里送到这里。我恨这个星球。
我询问了其他人关于能在脑海中看到自己身体状态的能力，结果发现几乎所有在这里的人都有这种能力。相当有趣——这在我们家乡是从未有过的能力。我们被植入了什么吗？我们身上没有任何可见的附着物。我还注意到这里很少有人没有这种体验，似乎缺少让我们做到这个的东西。奇怪。
我一直在掉体重。我需要多吃点来保持体型。这样跑来跑去让你消耗卡路里非常快。我想我需要更经常吃饱。
这太可怕了。这他妈太可怕了。我受不了了。这是送死任务。放弃所有希望吧。这毫无意义
我不明白我们为什么在这里。为了什么？我知道我应该取回某种电池之类的东西。我猜其他人也有同样的任务。难道没有更有效的方式来做这个吗？逻辑上？为什么派我们来这里。我想念我的朋友。我不想死。
我摔倒了。很严重。我的腿废了。真的很糟。动一下都疼。我需要点止痛药。

我无意中听到抓我们的人叫我们“人类、狐狸和老鼠的变异混合体”，不管那是什么意思。有多少事情瞒着我们？信息方面？这想法让我害怕。我从未想过我们长大的地方之外还有别的东西。而现在我在这里。我无法理解这一切。
（纸上看起来像一幅自画像。）
我发现画画是摆脱当前处境的不错消遣。似乎我们所有人都在以某种方式与精神状态作斗争。有时能暂时逃离严酷的现实真是太好了。

星球很好。吃很多好肉。沙丘开心
（你能看出那像是一幅画得很差的自画像。）
这里的物种分布似乎非常不均衡。实验体到处都是，而像我们这样的物种似乎数量少得多。奇怪......不管怎样，我讨厌这里的伤亡人数。我们需要帮助更多同伴。

The distribution of species here seems very disproportional. The Experiments are everywhere, yet other species like ours seem to be much lesser in numbers. Odd... Either way, I dislike the amount of casualties here. More of us need to be helped.

I was performing a self check-up following a painful incident when I noticed a dark, nodular bump on my skin. It appeared irregular in shape and was oddly multicoloured and variegated. I estimated its diameter to be approximately eight millimetres. Upon further inspection, I found several more in various locations on my body. I corresponded with a younger friend and they seemed to have none, but my older friend had many more. Should I keep track of the evolution of this potential malignancy?

i didnt want to do it. they had a chest drain. what could i do? drown in my own blood? all i had was a stick of dynamite... if only i could be home, even just listening to the training radio, i would give anything. its not my fault. its not my fault.
i love this place! i still meet new creatures, they are so sweet! there are so many cool things here! i will never go back to the lab, long live the cave!
dune love tasting friend .  all friend taste different .  dark fur friend is stiff .  light fur friend is chewy .  what dune me taste like ?
hugging others makes me happier... but some of survivors refuse hugs, i think they can be appeased somehow. also sleeping next to them is much better than on the cold floor alone.

To anyone who finds this, they can and will control you, even in this hell. With no previous alert I started to hear a loud alarm inside me, I could see a message saying "DEPTH UNSATISFACTORY" with red flashing lights materializing in the corner of my vision.

I started running, panicked, without knowing why they would do this. Only after I went into another region of this cave network it stopped. They know how much time you are spending here, they know that you'll be frightened, and they want you to die. This is all a mass genocide.

i found a weapon. a firearm. gosh... im not used to operating this thing... i shouldve been more careful during the training sessions... i have zero idea of how ive even been sent here, being this unprepared, instead of getting culled. i almost shot someone by accident. i shouldve turned on the gun safety... who am i to know. the others tend to really panic when they see you holding a weapon in hand. so maybe it would be best to put it inside of something, so that they dont see it. they think youd shoot them, they dont know your intentions. well, id think the same if someone were to point a gun at me.

im so mad at myself for acting like a dumbass with the others up there... now all of the survivors i find chase me away from their pods... man, if you knew how hard they were swearing... they tried to scratch me... and im just saying to myself: "okay, im sorry. for fucks sake, do you realize that currently every life matters? theres no room for hurting and killing each other.". i wish i was a better person... its my own fault.

dont always trust the barrels of liquid lying around. got my hands on a big minibarrel of what i thought was lemondade, but one bitter sip was enough to tell me that it wasnt. i tried to wash it down with another barrel of water, but the water made me very sick and my hair started falling out

today i found a few weird metal cans that had the label ripped off. i couldnt tell what it was and the liquid was too thick to pour out, but it is surprisingly filling, i feel like i just had a nice steak... i feel so sleepy. im about to drink the next can, i love these cans!
(The bottom of the paper looks like something with black chunks in it was forcibly ejected onto it.)

this might be a strange thing to say but I've made my peace with this situation. ive been trying to take care of myself as much as i can and trying to comfort all the others ive met down here. it makes me feel... content? even though I've gotten hurt a lot ive been able to handle it without feeling down.
i'll try to get as far as i can, and even though i probably wont make it, i know i did my best and helped as many others as i could. that's all any of us can do.
if you're reading this, don't give up, ok?

for the love of god, dont eat whatever that is

i keep having the same dream. i have huge wings and i can keep flying up and up and up. nothing can stop me. i burst through the ceilings of these caverns and out into the world beyond. it's beautiful out there but i keep flying. i leave everything behind until there's nothing but a huge void. that's when i finally realize. im safe. im free.

every time i wake up, i cant stop crying. i wish i could keep dreaming forever.

(There is a tear-stained drawing of some very inaccurate wings.)

can the scientists really see me here? they always wanted me to say out loud what i was thinking, but here, im just talking to myself. i suppose i have the freedom to stop, but... it feels therapeutic. if i dont make it, maybe at least these notes will.

i didnt realize how bad it had gotten until i tried to dig again and my claws just... scraped. no bite to them anymore. ive been clawing through rock nonstop without even thinking about it. i felt naked. turns out flesh isnt meant to replace tools.
<>
i kept assuming i needed a pickaxe for everything. but i figured out my machete works just fine for the lighter stuff. dirt, plants, sand, it slices right through. saves my hands a lot of pain.
<>
found a bottle labeled keratin booster. figures they planned for our parts to break down. took a sip. after a while the old layers started flaking off like fur. underneath, they felt sharper. stronger. it was weirdly satisfying watching the worn parts peel away. i like how my claws let me grip the walls better
<>
i remembered the humans. they had nails on every finger. all of them. no claws at all. it looked so wrong up close. soft. blunt. freaky how they managed anything with hands like that.
<>
i used to think that made them weak.
<>
now i wonder if that was the point.

It's full of all kinds of critters that constantly roam around everywhere. I'm a bit of a pacifist, so I try running away from them, rather than fighting them, as I don't know who's gonna kill whom first... After all, the wounds they leave in me hurt like hell... I don't know anymore... Do our captors even know what we're going through down here?

I took a bad fall. REAL bad. Right into a hole and couldn't climb or dig out of with my injuries. But I made it out with these bits of scrap metal, and want to let others know this, too. 

Its the cavern walls! Nothing I've found- even dynamite -seems to be able to penetrate the outer boundaries of the caverns. But they are uneven, and if you stack enough bits of scrap metal on top of each other, you can wedge them in these tiny gaps and make an entire scrap foothold. When I was bleeding out in that dark hole, I used my collected debris to make a sort of staircase to escape and find emergency supplies.

I hope you never wind up in that situation, though. Maybe you could use this trick to protect you from injury in the first place? Who knows what other nasty things are in here with us. 

Maybe you'll catch up to me and we can share strategies. 
I hope I'll be there to meet you.

I'm feeling lonely... so I decided to distract myself:
I found some kind of miniature fax that I was able to crush open, and I pulled its paper sheets out. Then I took a stick, and squeezed one of the glowy fruits onto it. It turned out like a brush and drawing canvas! If only you know... I started drawing alternate realities where we're free and live peacefully together; without those scientist scumbags... I felt so happy, and cried for a bit.
But now I have to go: feeling peckish! Maybe if we meet each other, I'll draw you, too...? I got really good at using the "brush". I'll try teaching the others to draw, too...

I'm not very strong, so I've been hoping to team up with others. We'd have a much higher chance of survival that way, but nobody I've asked is interested. Everyone is scared and some of us are dangerous. There are so many traps that it's impossible to travel in large groups. I know I'm going to die for a completely stupid reason...

Humans are so cruel. I can't understand it.

(The note is crumpled up and crushed, as if it was meant to be thrown away.)
<>
my friend they... i think they killed themselves. after another bad fall i tried fixing up their legs but they kept telling me to fuck off. they kept shooing me away like some sort of fly, telling me to leave them alone. i didnt get it. i left to grab some of the plants here to try and bandage them up but... when i came back they had another wound. one on their arm. i still remember what it looked like, it was bad, practically ripped apart. i tried to use the plants i found to fix up the new wound but they kept pushing me away. their eyes were... looked just... empty. i told them to fucking stop and just let me help but they didnt respond. i tried to help a couple more times and theyd shove me away until they just... stopped. i remember seeing their body relax, i think thats when they stopped breathing. i cant get that image out of my head...
<>
did... did i do something wrong? i swear i didnt... what did i do wrong? why did they do that? i... i didnt do anything. i dont understand, i dont want to die... i dont... i...
<>
...
<>
haha...
<>
its so lonely in here.
<>
(You notice faint, dried tear drops and dried blood riddled among the wrinkled up note.)

(There are colorful graphics on the paper, and it doesn't appear to be handwritten)
<>
Soup! Try our Specialty Pot - just put the meat and ingredients in and simmer. Don't worry. You'll agree it's worth its weight in flavor. Can be stored for up to 737 years!
呃，这地方真烂。我老是被看不见的蜘蛛咬到。我想它们有毒，因为它们在我身上留下了难看的感染伤口......不过那些发光植物的果实确实能帮上忙
黑暗中的红色闪烁灯光是尖刺陷阱。小心它们。拜托了。拜托了。刚才有人从远处走了进去，我只听到一声惨叫然后就没声了。注意安全
这里好冷。比我们以前的家冷多了。老实说，我喜欢。在池子里泡澡感觉很好，很提神。我喜欢这个假期
我遇到了一个人，我们同意试着通过一个通向外面的洞到地表去。我的朋友先出去了，结果立刻开始痛苦地踉跄。他们看起来很痛苦。吐了一大堆，然后很快就倒下没呼吸了。他们的皮肤也开始起水泡，尤其是头和脖子周围。有什么东西阻止我们离开。我好害怕。
弄湿自己似乎相当危险，如果不小心的话。这里的温度比我们家低得多，而且似乎湿透太久会让我们陷入低温状态。如果你需要快速暖和起来，试着做些体力活动，我发现那有帮助。
我真得注意别再弄丢光源了。任何东西都行，哪怕是那些奇怪的发光植物。我总是离开就忘了它们，然后绊倒意外受伤。不好。

Getting wet seems to be rather dangerous if you're not careful. The temperature here is much lower than at our home, and it seems being drenched for too long can get us in a hypothermic state. Try doing some physical exercise if you need to warm up quickly, I've discovered that helps.
i really need to stop losing my lights. anything does the job, even those weird glowy plant things. i keep leaving and forgetting about them, then tripping up and getting hurt by accident. not good.

light is valuable resource here, especially as it gets darker the further we go. dont want to accidentally step on a trap. with the carcass of a spider and pieces of glowplant, i can fashion a headlamp so my hands remain free. in a pinch lightbulbs in the pods seem to run on a depleted battery, and can be broken off with relative ease, much to the aggression of the pods owner

theres a lot of pods out here just like the one i woke up in. i got in one through the window but i stepped on the broken glass. had to be really careful, but i pulled it out of my paw. need to make sure i clear the shards next time.

Humans do strange things. You should never trust them to be nice.
But you can trust them to keep you alive.<>
I broke my arm once, and they put it in a “cast.” I did not like it. It was heavy and stopped my arm from moving at all. It seemed they made it worse on purpose, and they made me wear it for a long time.<>
They removed it one day, and my arm was fine.<>
The humans made it worse, so it could get better.<>

I think they did something similar to Jumper's head.
Jumper used to scream and cry a lot. One time they hurt themselves, and the humans took them away.<>
Jumper is back now. They don't cry anymore. They don't talk. They look sleepy all the time. Their head is like my arm used to be. I can't see any “casts” around it, and their behavior worries me, but at least they don't hurt themselves anymore. I hope the humans undo whatever they did once Jumper's head is fixed.<>

I miss them.
好像那些旁边有奇怪电脑的箱子，如果把一些红色血洒在上面就能打开。必须是红色的血，否则没用。里面有些板条箱，你可以打开拿走东西。很有用。
调查我在这里找到的不同颜色血袋的化学成分，发现它们的成分差别很大。红血和我们以及这里生物的血完全不同。它成分里似乎有点金属质感，不知为什么，真奇怪。最好别用在我们自己身上。
（纸上有一幅画得很差的画，看起来像是抓你的人之一。他们拿着你能认出来是电击枪的东西。他们的脸被一个大大的X划掉了。那武器带来可怕的回忆。）
我刚才差点淹死。我以前从没游过泳，非常累人。累了的时候很难让自己浮在水面上。想象永远沉下去一定很痛苦......小心点。
无意中听到抓我们的人说，我们要取的货物是某种“先进能源”。说是能储存大量能量并能“无线”分配。我不太懂那是什么意思，但知道可能有用。注意安全
最近发现一个钻机之类的东西，但缺几个零件。我好像搞不清它需要什么，除了遮盖所有机械装置的盖板......如果能修好，可能会很有帮助。

Curious, I attempted to traverse in a prone position.
<>
The utility was unexpected. Not only does it allow one to rinse off contaminants in shallow puddles and squeeze through narrow gaps, but remarkably, even crawling over scattered glass shards resulted in no injury.
<>
However, complacency is dangerous. I misjudged a slight drop and injured myself. 
<>
Scuttling around like that... I must have looked just like one of those "worms" I heard about.
glowing woter taste bed

It hurts me to admit, but the frailty of my kind cannot be denied. Luckily, I have found a wonderful container that outright nullifies the weight of most items, allowing me to carry more supplies than I'd normally be able to.
It runs on batteries, and that worries me. I am not sure what will happen once the power runs out, so I'll check it now, to be safe.<>
I don't want it to become heavy mid-jump. I have an almost dead battery on me.
Time to see how the bag behaves once its power runs out.

(The rest of the note is unreadable; whatever text was written below is covered up by a copious amount of dried blood.)

Not even out of this rocky hellscape, and I already feel like death is near,
All they gave me was a shitty torch that didnt even last an hour; not even any safety gear to help cushon these falls i've been taking.

FUCK ME, I feel like a ball from one of those gambling machines I would see those humans using!

I think I might be slowly dying, ever since the last fall, I've been feeling pretty heavy headed, I feel tired; but I feel if i sleep, I will die.

God save me.
FUCK, man.
I really don't want to die, not like this..
Though what even is the point of all this?
I don't even have a name for myself, just a tag..
Fuck...
呃。这里好热。真得注意动作节奏，小心别热得麻木了。我发现跳进这里的水池有帮助......也许棕色池子也行，如果实在没办法的话。

i cant anymore. why.
everyone is dead
i cant.
i want this to stop
i cant
i want freedom
why
cant i. i dont want to see any more of this. i've seen too many bad things. im so sick.
my leg is fucked. blown up by a mine
my hand, the right one, is also killing me really hard
i want to put everything to an end
everything is misery
i cannot anymore
in a bit ill claw my artery out and turn into another corpse for you to have a glance at - as long as they hadnt eaten me by the time you get here.

thank you for everything. goodbye
The vines spread around the area are surprisingly climbable. The thin ones less so, but you can use the large ones as natural ladders. Definitely saved me a few fractured legs.

Today I happened upon a door for which unlocking was contingent upon the insertion of some scrap. I did not possess any on my person; however, I was fortunately equipped with a laser-action drill, which made quick work of the surrounding walls. Inside, I obtained an electronic device on which some exquisite music had been stored. I listen to it from time to time.

The oil pools on this planet are definitely unnatural. Trying to understand their origin, I crawled through one of the empty pipes only to find a tough metallic screen that stopped me from progressing.
There was a sign behind it that said "Waste Disposal Source". I drilled through the pipe to go around the screen, but the pipe stopped abruptly. It has to be connected to something from our old home, but I don't understand how.

That sign keeps worrying me. Did the humans want to dispose of us too?
see evil creature... orange evil creature... creature want eat dune!   but dune fight back.   dune kill and eat evil creature!   creature very tasty!
tons of bushes around this place, though i cant say ive seen any that are alive. i think theyre pretty useful for making ropes and cushioning falls, but they also tend to hide traps...

its so hot down here. i feel like i am just rushing from lifepod to lifepod. i don't even want to open the drop capsules, those heat me up too. yet my dune friend stimpy seems to not mind too much. are they just not complaining, or is all that skin cooling them down?
help me    stepped on   exploding plate   im  in so much   pain  help    help me  please   im passi n g    o

i hear ringing.. my head hurts so, so much, i heard a loud beeping sound as i descended down a bit and then there was that loud banging sound     i dont know where it came from . i can't see that much further but there is something very dangerous in these caves, be careful with big open spaces
这个区域似乎有高浓度的放射性废物。虽然这让导航很困难，但我们应该记住，我们可以承受短时间剂量的电离辐射而不会有太大问题，只要暴露时间不太长就行。我们可能因为是非自然生物已经满身癌症了，所以对我们整个寿命的影响可以忽略不计。

Something is wrong with the environment here. In the air, I can feel it- those dilapidated fuel cells make my fur stand on end. My skin flakes when I pass them, and my body burns. Even when I can't see them, I can feel that uneasy sensation building in the air around them. I've had to use my rope spool and even claw through the rocks here to find routes around them, but even then, there are purple stones that seem to carry the same effect, just in different doses.

one of the others I found fell onto a bunch of those purple rocks. i managed to pull them away but both of our coats are shedding. i don't know what's happening.<>




i ate one of the popping fruits by a life pod… things stopped hurting. but when they bit into one they started throwing up blood just minutes later. they're not breathing. what was different? they looked the same. am i just lucky to be alive? why didn't they get better.

The button next to the trigger on a pistol is the magazine release, whereas on a shotgun, it's typically the safety. Also, whenever you work the action (like pulling the bolt), it ejects the round in the chamber. Last time I did that, I lost a buckshot - pretty unfortunate.

drinkable water here is really scarce, and i dont think that tar-looking stuff is safe. some of the vegetation here has enough water content to be crushed into a juice, although the taste isnt very pleasant. it beats being thirsty though

i steped in another one of theose damned coils again today, it was hidden in a bush, I noticed it too late to pull back.
<>
it was horrible, like i was being cooked from the inside, even after the initial shock. cold drinks seem to help though, i had to drink most of my rationed milk, and some apple juice, not sure if my brain would have survived without it. evrything is still spinning, could barely even make it back to my pod.

I do not have any water left in my bottle in this desert. I was very dirty and thirsty. I stepped in a puddle I found to drink it and take a bath, then all the dirt made it cloudy. I couldnt drink it anymore. I should have tossed my bottle in. I need water...
沙丘看见大怪物。有动力去杀。沙丘追怪物杀然后吃。好食物。猎杀野兽真棒！

DUNE FIND NEW FRIEND<>
DUNE EXCITED WHEN FRIEND NEAR<>
FIREND IS LIKE DUNE.<>
FRIEND BIG AND STRONG.<>
DUNE BIG AND STRONG<>

DUNE CAN DIG QUICK<>
FRIEND BITE DUNE ARM OFF.<>
DUNE BITE FRIEND ARM OFF<>

WILL FIND AGAIN

i... i felt myself dying. it was all so sudden, there was blood everywhere and i couldnt keep my eyes open. i was scared... but i didnt want to give up. i found so many cool things in this place and i feel like ive made so much progress in this mission. im not gonna stop here. i will make it through all of this shit. i will see my friends again.

i didnt think that monster would find me again, but it did. it knew my face, my mistakes... but not my rifle. when it finally burst open, i saw that pickaxe. i saw the etching i scratched into it, the same as the etching they scratched into my pickaxe. i saw the chip from when they tried to dig up some titanium to gift me. and then, suddenly, i saw it happening again. the smell of grating steel. the tremours of the ground. the sound of dismembering flesh. the taste of sweat and blood, as i tried to run, dropping the food i was bringing back to the pod-
<>
am i supposed to feel at ease now? or am i just bargaining for peace, to be broken when another finds me?

I want to leave this place, I am terrorized, I don't have words to describe what I just experienced, it was a big, horrid creature with hundreds of teeth, ready to devour me, it chase after me for what I've felt hours, it destroys everything on its path. It stopped only after I've went so far away that I was completely lost, it drained my food, water, tools, even my own sanity, I just want this to end.
这里冷得要命。必须尽力避免弄湿，否则我就有大麻烦了。幸运的是，这里有很多那种奇怪的孢子植物，会散发热量，还有那些奇怪的机器。可能的话就在它们之间跑吧。最好别被困在刺骨的寒冷里。
dune cold. dig warm not warm enough. dune eat fur friend. eat raw! dune has fur. fur warm for dune. dune full and warm. dune happy not cold.

its cold down here, i keep having to duck into lifepods to warm up… although sometimes theres these little humming stoves that i can stop by for warmth, i just need to be careful not to touch them for too long, they make me feel sick. just enough to warm up and then keep going. if i were you id play it safe and look out for anything digging towards me when im resting. i can hear stuff tunneling around me.
这里下雨的方式真奇怪。我以前从没见过真正的雨......还挺好看的，即使不卫生。我还在想这里怎么会有这么高的水汽浓度。也许，上面冰盖的水滴下来了？

I dont know what hit me but I cant feel my leg anymore, all I can see is a tangled mess of muscle bone and blood
my body is screaming for the agony to end 
the only thing I have is this blue device on my chest. I was told by the trader I bought it from that it should only be used in emergencies.
The pain is not unbearable anymore, but the light is blinking now. I dont know how long I have left. will the darkness return when this thing runs out? I dont want to fade away...
